method: TF-IDF keyword classifier (lesson_tagger.py) evaluated on existing INDEX.md themes

in_sample_accuracy.note: In-sample: test set = training set (themed lessons used to build profiles)

distribution_bias.note: Meta themes have broad keyword vocabulary capturing general swarm lessons

count_integrity.note: INDEX.md counts were soft manual estimates — 360 themed lessons had no explicit assignment. Classifier provides structural assignment but needs meta-bias calibration.

expect: Theme classifier reduces unthemed from 67% to <40%. Keyword tagger >70% accuracy.
actual: 96.7% in-sample accuracy. 0.1% unthemed. But meta-bias: 62% of lessons classified to 4 meta themes. Count inflation artifact in INDEX.md (claimed 542 themed, only 182 explicit).
diff: Predicted <40% unthemed — got 0.1% (far exceeded). Predicted >70% accuracy — got 96.7% (exceeded). Did NOT predict meta-theme bias (62% capture). Did NOT predict INDEX.md count inflation (360-lesson gap). Did NOT predict tool already existed (lesson_tagger.py built by prior session).
successor: Calibrate meta-bias: (1) weight theme keywords by specificity; (2) add Domain: field to lessons as secondary signal; (3) cross-validate with leave-one-out.
